title: kerneria pilosa
intro: Kerneria pilosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and the Middle East. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Kerneria pilosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications and uses in traditional medicine.
